title: How to combine date column + number column to reflect in a Due date column?
excerpt:
So basically, is there a way to get the due date to result from date column + number (of days) in a separate column? 
The date column will always vary but the numbers column will use a limited set of days (30, 45, 90, 12…

posts.author: Antonia (Antonia)
posts.cookedHtml:
So basically, is there a way to get the due date to result from date column + number (of days) in a separate column?

The date column will always vary but the numbers column will use a limited set of days (30, 45, 90, 120).

Any integrations or automations that are able to help with this?

thanks!

posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Antonia ,

You can do this by creating “Mirror” column and “Formula” column.

posts.author: mmulloy (Morgan Mulloy)
posts.cookedHtml: This is great! Is there a way to add a condition that if the date lands on a weekend, that it then goes to the next business day?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @mmulloy - you would likely need to utilize a 3rd party app to deal with this. General Caster works well for this using the NETWORKDAYS() function (it also allows you to specify public holidays as well).
